name: replit-workspace
description: Comprehensive MCP server for interacting with Replit workspaces - manage repls, files, secrets, deployments, and more without needing a browser

requirements.name: REPLIT_TOKEN
requirements.description: Your Replit connect.sid token for authentication. Get this from your browser cookies when logged into Replit.

examples.name: Get current user
examples.description: Get information about the authenticated user

examples.name: List your repls
examples.description: Get a list of all repls in your account

examples.name: Fork a repl
examples.description: Fork an existing repl to your account

examples.name: Read a file
examples.description: Read the contents of a file from a repl

examples.name: Write a file
examples.description: Write content to a file in a repl

examples.name: List files
examples.description: List all files and directories in a repl

examples.name: Get secrets
examples.description: List all environment variables for a repl

examples.name: Get deployment info
examples.description: Get deployment status for a repl

examples.name: Get detailed repl info
examples.description: Get comprehensive repl information including stats
